declared.realized_primary: mean(vpath) — codebase life-path measure; gross; busts full weight
declared.pool_primary: career-complete cohorts (year<=2017; ~all exited, mean vpath length ~6)
declared.weight: equal per entrant (gross; busts full weight)
declared.smoother: Gaussian kernel over log-pick, adaptive bw to eff-n>=35 (mirrors frozen fit_year0)
declared.pick1: numeraire pin=3000, NOT a fit point — not scored as a miss
declared.pick99: deep-pick sink (n~252), not one exact pick — flagged
declared.fit_window: 2004-2024; held-out = 2003 (pre-fit complete) & 2025 (post-fit, censored -> excluded from realized calib)

deep_tail_sink_caveat: deep-tail smoothed realized is dominated by the pick-99+ sink (raw n@99=250; eff-n rises to ~391 by pick 99), so picks ~85–99 share essentially one realized estimate — the finest resolution the data support there
